title: Kinnikuman: Seigi Choujin vs. Senshi Choujin
titleRomaji: Kinnikuman: Seigi Choujin vs. Senshi Choujin
titleNative: キン肉マン 正義超人ＶＳ戦士超人
synonyms: Kinnikuman: Justice Superman vs. Soldier Superman
synopsis: Meat has been kidnapped by Iron Mask. In order to save Meat, the treasure of Inmora Island is needed. Furthermore, the treasure is hidden in the Seven Story Tower, which is guarded by the brutal Warrior Choujins. When Kinnikuman asks Terryman and the Justice Choujin to help him, for some reason they all refuse. Alone, Kinnikuman heads to Inmora Island to fight the Warrior Chōjin and is overwhelmed by their great numbers.

title: KING OF PRISM -Your Endless Call- Minna Kirameke! Prism☆Tours

synopsis: This time King of Prism is "Prism☆Tours"! Shin Ichijou and the other six members of SePTENTRION will travel across time and worlds in a time machine to the origins of Prism Shows. It will cross the boundaries of the series and intertwine with the worlds of the "Pretty Rhythm" series, "PriPara" series , "Kiratto Pri☆Chan", and "Waccha PriMagi!" to deliver a sparkling Prism☆Tours. Fated boy meets boy, our worlds are now connected by the prism's sparkle! (Source: Official Website, translated)
